text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The spring Tenno Sho has arrived. Tamamo Cross
is competing, so Oguri Cap and I came to scope
her out. However...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
She's pulled ahead! Tamamo Cross has taken the
lead! Tamamo Cross is out in front! Tamamo Cross
is leading the pack!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross breaks away from the middle and
immediately overtakes everyone in front of her.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross blazes forward at lightning speed!
She's got a commanding lead!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: She's truly fast... and powerful too.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I really want to compete against Tama!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In that case, there's only one choice for our next
race.
choice_data_list: Let's enter the autumn Tenno Sho!
Let's enter the autumn Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Thanks! I'm gonna give her a run for her money!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen is still ahead of us, but Oguri
Cap has already found her next goal!
